prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6G72TT (DOHC 24V twin-turbo V6, 3.0L) with forged internals including JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 15 psi boost capability on a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and Tomei 272-degree camshafts for 450+ hp at the wheels

Full custom wiring harness by Wireworks Wiring Specialties to integrate a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with dual Bosch 028 injectors, AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor, and a custom intercooler setup using a GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler with a 3-inch aluminum piping system and HKS SSQV blow-off valve

Chassis reinforcement with Cusco front strut tower bar, Ultra Racing 4-point front lower arm bar, and a custom 3-point rear subframe brace, paired with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8K/6K spring rates) and SuperPro polyurethane bushings for the rear trailing arms and front control arms
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit 9.5x18 ET15 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels wrapped in 245/40R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Custom rear wing based on the 1990 Mitsubishi Galant VR-4 Group A rally wing, fabricated in carbon fiber with adjustable angle mounts and integrated third brake light, paired with a custom front bumper lip from a 1992 Mitsubishi Debonair V with DRLs integrated into the fog light housings

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats in black Alcantara with red stitching, custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (8-point bolt-in with harness bar), and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a custom gauge cluster featuring Defi Advance BF series gauges (boost, oil pressure, water temp) and a digital dash from a 2000 Mitsubishi FTO GPX
